facebook.content: "I've come to realize that the greatest battles in my life aren't against people or circumstances, but against my own mindset. The question is, which mindset do you live by: the one that says I am enough, or the one that says I need more? Which one is your default? Share with us which one resonates more with you."
facebook.fullPost:

instagram.content:
Faith is not just about believing God can, it's about trusting God will. When life gets hard, do you:
Trust God will show up and make it right?
Trust God is already working everything out for your good?

Which one is your heart leaning towards?
